stemHtml: A millivoltmeter is used to measure EMF between a hot and cold junction of a thermocouple. The measurement can be directly graduated in temperature, if the temperature of...

options.a: the hot junction adjusted to the standard temperature of 15°C.
options.b: the hot junction and the cold junction are the same.
options.c: the hot junction is kept constant.
options.d: the cold junction is kept constant.
